comment: Allow-list for fenced code blocks that are intentionally NOT tracked as catalog rows. Drift detector (quality/gates/docs-repro/snippet-extract.py --check) treats these as covered. Schema spec: each id is a derived_id from snippet-extract.py --list. Add a `reasons` map (id -> reason) when expanding. Anti-bloat: when this list crosses 30 entries, consider switching the docs-repro pipeline to allow-list mode wholesale per quality/gates/docs-repro/README.md pivot rules.

reasons.snippet/docs/index.md:24-39: Mermaid architecture diagram; illustrative -- no runnable command
reasons.snippet/docs/index.md:70-75: After-snapshot demo prose (cd + sed + echo + git commit); covered conceptually by docs-repro/example-01-shell-loop
